Patch Set 1:

ping

Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

Generally looks sensible, but I'm not clear on one thing.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

The FS_SYNC_FL move could be done in a different patch.

Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

Patch Set 1:

> RHEL7 lacks the statx AT_STATX_* defines so they need to be manually added.

That doesn't explain why they needed to be added *by*this*patch*.
Did it work on RHEL7 before this patch?  If so, what changed in this patch which caused it to stop working.  I cannot see anything, so I was asking if you could explain which part of the change I'm missing.

Patch Set 1:

For RHEL7 those values are defined in linux/stat.h but if I include that header it conflicts with fnctl.h :-( Let me see if I can make it a bit cleaner.
Uploaded patch set 2.

parents.subject: LU-6142 mdt: Fix style issues for mdt_reint.c

commit.subject: LU-12511 utils: Move utilies specific values out of Lustre UAPI headers
commit.message:
LU-12511 utils: Move utilies specific values out of Lustre UAPI headers

Use FS_IOC_FS[S|G]ETXATTR directly. Move several things in the
UAPI header lustre_user.h that is only needed by user land tools
to the proper places.

Change-Id: Ie7a33742c0aba478c365c5fa44315400b28d8193
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/38790
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Wang Shilong <wshilong@ddn.com>
